overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character exploring the historic city of Saint Denis. The character walks from a narrow alley into open cobblestone streets, interacts with a passing tram, and continues along covered sidewalks lined with historic buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley between brick wall and historic buildings

events.description: exits narrow alley into open cobblestone intersection

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along dirt path beside brick wall, heading toward open street

entered.detail: tall weathered brick wall with stone cap running along the left side of the alley
black wrought iron fence atop the brick wall with decorative spikes
three-story yellow stucco building with arched windows and balcony visible at the end of the alley
wooden wagon or cart parked on the right side of the alley

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow alleyway with a high brick wall on the left and buildings on the right. The ground is dirt and mud. As the character approaches the end of the alley, the scene opens up into a wider cobblestone street with historic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic city intersection with cobblestone streets

events.description: character turns left and continues walking through the intersection
tram approaches from the right side of the intersection

agents.ego_description: navigating through the cobblestone intersection, passing pedestrians and horse-drawn carriages

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving slowly through the intersection

entered.detail: tall black street clock on a pole showing approximately noon
black wooden carriage with large wheels being pulled by horses
three-story building with ornate iron balconies and large windows on the corner
wide open area with cobblestone paving and street car tracks

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a sunlit cobblestone intersection surrounded by historic buildings with ornate balconies. A prominent street clock stands in the center while horse-drawn carriages and pedestrians move about. The character turns left and continues through the busy intersection as a tram approaches.

events.description: tram passes directly in front of the character from right to left

agents.ego_description: stopping to let the tram pass before continuing across the tracks

notable_agents.action: red and grey tram moving along tracks with 'City of Saint Denis' written on the side

entered.detail: red and grey electric tram with 'Pacific Union R.R.' and 'City of Saint Denis' signage

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the tram tracks as a large red and grey streetcar passes by. The tram displays 'City of Saint Denis' and 'Pacific Union R.R.' on its side. After the tram passes, the character stands at the corner observing the surroundings.

events.description: character stops and looks around before continuing

agents.ego_description: standing at the corner looking around at the architecture and street activity

notable_agents.action: man in suit walking past the character on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large classical building with columns and 'Lemoyne National Bank' signage
three-story dark building with balconies and ground floor shops

segments.scene_description: The character stands at a street corner near the Lemoyne National Bank, a grand building with classical columns. Pedestrians in period clothing walk by while horse-drawn carriages wait along the curb. The character observes the surroundings before continuing along the sidewalk.

events.description: character enters covered sidewalk area under building awnings

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk passing by shop windows and doorways

entered.detail: overhead awning providing shade over the sidewalk attached to the buildings
large display windows with white lattice frames and signage

segments.scene_description: The character walks under the covered sidewalk awnings of the historic buildings, passing the Lemoyne National Bank entrance. The lighting becomes softer and more diffused under the shade. The character continues along the paved sidewalk past shopfronts with large windows.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the shaded sidewalk past various storefronts and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in dress standing near the bookstore entrance

entered.detail: storefront with green signage reading 'Schweitzer's Booksellers' and decorative iron balcony above
large stone columns of a grand building visible further down the street

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the covered sidewalk, passing Schweitzer's Booksellers with its distinctive green signage. The walkway is shaded by continuous awnings, and pedestrians in period clothing stroll along or stand near doorways. The architecture features ornate iron balconies and large stone columns.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped, muddy alleyway into the expansive, sunlit urban bustle of historic Saint Denis. It begins by following the character through a narrow passage of brick walls and dirt, which gradually opens into a wide cobblestone intersection filled with ornate balconies and a central street clock. As the character navigates the busy crossing, the scene shifts to a momentary pause at the tracks for a passing red and grey streetcar before turning toward the classical columns of the Lemoyne National Bank. The camera then moves from the bright open street into the soft, diffused light of covered sidewalks, passing by grand stone columns and the green signage of Schweitzer's Booksellers. Finally, the movement continues along the shaded walkway, gliding past period pedestrians and large shop windows beneath a canopy of continuous awnings.
